Custom Horse Trailer Stickers

Create One-of-a-Kind Horse Trailer Stickers!

Read All Reviews

Click on a template to customize your product

    Upload a Print Ready File

    Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.
    For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.

    Step 1 - Choose Choose a product and the size you want

    Browse

      Step 3 - Provide Instructions Please include any special instructions that our designers should know while putting your project together!

      Add to Cart

      Please specify if you would like your product Kiss-cut or Die-Cut

      More About Stickers for Your Horse Trailer Return to Top

      Create your designs right online, or upload your own artwork. You can add clipart and text of horse-themed images. Promote your barn or show circuit while parked or driving around.

      Why Choose Decals.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Made in the USA

      All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

       

      Fast Turnaround

      Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

      Track Your Order

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      Are horse trailer stickers waterproof?

      Yes, they are! Equestrian sports, rodeos and farm work can get muddy, messy — and worse. Our vinyl material can withstand rain, UV and scratching. 

      What material are your stickers made from?

      We offer two vinyl material options for your plant and garden stickers. Our removable vinyl material is made from a low tack vinyl. It has a 1 to 3 year outdoor durability lifespan when properly applied and maintained.

      If you are looking for something long-lasting, then we recommend our permanent vinyl material. Made from a calendered vinyl material with an outdoor durability of 3 to 5 years when properly applied and maintained.

      outdoor durability lifespan when properly applied and maintained.

      Do your stickers have a glossy or matte finish?

      Our vinyl stickers  come in both a gloss or matte finish.

      Will my design impact the pricing of my decal?

      No, the only things that will impact the cost are size, material and quantity, and also whether you choose to have professional design help.

      Order Horse Trailer Decals

title: Horse Trailer Stickers - Order Today | Decals.com
metaDescription: Recreate the likeness of your own trusty stead with a horse trailer decal. Full color printing on high quality vinyl materials. Use the online design tool to upload your artwork.
